{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"150: \\t\\t}\\n151: \\n152: \\t\\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\\n153: \\t\\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\\n154: \\t\\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\\n155: \\t\\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\\n156: \\t\\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\\n157: \\t\\t\\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\\n158: \\t\\t\\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\\n159: \\t\\t}\\n160: \\n161: \\t\\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\\n162: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n163: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\\n164: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, err\\n165: \\t\\t}\\n166: \\n167: \\t\\tvar (\\n168: \\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\\n169: \\t\\t\\tbuckets            []int\\n170: \\t\\t)\\n171: \\n172: \\t\\tfor _, d := range distributions {\\n173: \\t\\t\\t// don't include 0% rollouts\\n174: \\t\\t\\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\\n175: \\t\\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\\n176: \\n177: \\t\\t\\t\\tif buckets == nil {\\n178: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\\n179: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n180: \\t\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n181: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\\n182: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n183: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n184: \\t\\t\\t}\\n185: \\t\\t}\\n186: \\n187: \\t\\t// no distributions for rule\\n188: \\t\\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\\n189: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Info(\\\"no distributions for rule\\\")\\n190: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n191: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n192: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n193: \\t\\t}\\n194: \\n195: \\t\\tvar (\\n196: \\t\\t\\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\\n197: \\t\\t\\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\\n198: \\t\\t\\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\\n199: \\t\\t\\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\\n200: \\t\\t\\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\\n201: \\t\\t)\\n202: \\n203: \\t\\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\\n204: \\t\\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\\n205: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = false\\n206: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match any distributions\\\")\\n207: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n208: \\t\\t}\\n209: \\n210: \\t\\td := validDistributions[index]\\n211: \\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"matched distribution\\\", zap.Reflect(\\\"evaluation_distribution\\\", d))\\n212: \\n213: \\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n214: \\t\\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\\n215: \\t\\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\\n216: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n217: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n218: \\t} // end rule loop\\n219: \\n220: \\treturn resp, nil\\n221: }\\n222: \\n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\\n224: // on the match type.\\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\\n226: \\tconstraintMatches := 0\\n227: \\n228: \\tvar reason string\\n229: \\n230: \\tfor _, c := range constraints {\\n231: \\t\\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\\n232: \\n233: \\t\\tvar (\\n234: \\t\\t\\tmatch bool\\n235: \\t\\t\\terr   error\\n236: \\t\\t)\\n237: \\n238: \\t\\tswitch c.Type {\\n239: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n240: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\\n241: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n242: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\\n243: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n244: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\\n245: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n246: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\\n247: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n248: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\\n249: \\t\\tdefault:\\n250: \\t\\t\\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\\\"unknown constraint type\\\")\\n251: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f@3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8/-/blob/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go%3FL150-250\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "150: \t\t}\n151: \n152: \t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n153: \t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n154: \t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n155: \t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n156: \t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n157: \t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n158: \t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n159: \t\t}\n160: \n161: \t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n162: \t\tif err != nil {\n163: \t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n164: \t\t\treturn resp, err\n165: \t\t}\n166: \n167: \t\tvar (\n168: \t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n169: \t\t\tbuckets            []int\n170: \t\t)\n171: \n172: \t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n173: \t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n174: \t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n175: \t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n176: \n177: \t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n178: \t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n179: \t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n180: \t\t\t\t} else {\n181: \t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n182: \t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n183: \t\t\t\t}\n184: \t\t\t}\n185: \t\t}\n186: \n187: \t\t// no distributions for rule\n188: \t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n189: \t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n190: \t\t\tresp.Match = true\n191: \t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n192: \t\t\treturn resp, nil\n193: \t\t}\n194: \n195: \t\tvar (\n196: \t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n197: \t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n198: \t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n199: \t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n200: \t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n201: \t\t)\n202: \n203: \t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n204: \t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n205: \t\t\tresp.Match = false\n206: \t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n207: \t\t\treturn resp, nil\n208: \t\t}\n209: \n210: \t\td := validDistributions[index]\n211: \t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n212: \n213: \t\tresp.Match = true\n214: \t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n215: \t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n216: \t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n217: \t\treturn resp, nil\n218: \t} // end rule loop\n219: \n220: \treturn resp, nil\n221: }\n222: \n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n224: // on the match type.\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n226: \tconstraintMatches := 0\n227: \n228: \tvar reason string\n229: \n230: \tfor _, c := range constraints {\n231: \t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n232: \n233: \t\tvar (\n234: \t\t\tmatch bool\n235: \t\t\terr   error\n236: \t\t)\n237: \n238: \t\tswitch c.Type {\n239: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n240: \t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n241: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n242: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n243: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n244: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n245: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n246: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n247: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n248: \t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n249: \t\tdefault:\n250: \t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n251: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f@3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8/-/blob/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go%3FL150-250"
  }
}

          },
          {
            "content": "16: // MultiVariateEvaluator is an abstraction for evaluating a flag against a set of rules for multi-variate flags.\n17: type MultiVariateEvaluator interface {\n18: \tEvaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error)\n19: }\n20: ",

      {
        "chunks": [
          {
            "content": "24: // Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\n25: type Evaluator struct {\n26: \tlogger *zap.Logger\n27: ",
            "endLine": 27,
            "startLine": 24
          },
          {
            "content": "37: \n38: func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n39: \t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n40: \t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n41: \tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n42: \t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n43: \t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n44: \t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n45: \t}\n46: ",
            "endLine": 46,
            "startLine": 37
          },
          {
            "content": "284: \n285: \tswitch segmentMatchType {\n286: \tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n287: \t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n288: ",

          }

            "content": "290: \n291: - No value bug for boolean constraint type (#2395)\n292: - Support fern and customizable allowed headers via CORS (#2393)\n293: ",

          {
            "content": "157: \n158: - `cfg`: json schema missing storage type oci (#2674)\n159: - `ui`: boolean constraint type asks for value when you edit it (#2671)\n160: - Combobox not showing options upon input click (#2642)\n161: ",

32. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "syntax = \"proto3\";\n\npackage flipt.evaluation;\n\nimport \"google/protobuf/timestamp.proto\";\n\noption go_package = \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\";\n\nmessage EvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2;\n  string flag_key = 3;\n  string entity_id = 4;\n  map<string, string> context = 5;\n  string reference = 6;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationRequest requests = 3;\n  string reference = 4;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationResponse {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationResponse responses = 2;\n  double request_duration_millis = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationReason {\n    UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n    FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n    MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON = 2;\n    DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON = 3;\n}\n\nenum ErrorEvaluationReason {\n  UNKNOWN_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n  NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationResponseType {\n  VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 0;\n  BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 1;\n  ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationResponse {\n    EvaluationResponseType type = 1;\n    oneof response {\n        BooleanEvaluationResponse boolean_response = 2;\n        VariantEvaluationResponse variant_response = 3;\n        ErrorEvaluationResponse error_response = 4;\n    }\n}\n\nmessage BooleanEvaluationResponse {\n  bool enabled = 1;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 2;\n  string request_id = 3;\n  double request_duration_millis = 4;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 5;\n  string flag_key = 6;\n}\n\nmessage VariantEvaluationResponse {\n  bool match = 1;\n  repeated string segment_keys = 2;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  string request_id = 6;\n  double request_duration_millis = 7;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 8;\n  string flag_key = 9;\n  string segment_match_type = 10;\n}\n\nmessage ErrorEvaluationResponse {\n  string flag_key = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2;\n  ErrorEvaluationReason reason = 3;\n}\n\nservice EvaluationService {\n  rpc Boolean(EvaluationRequest) returns (BooleanEvaluationResponse) {}\n  rpc Variant(EvaluationRequest) returns (VariantEvaluationResponse) {}\n  rpc Batch(BatchEvaluationRequest) returns (BatchEvaluationResponse) {}\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationDistribution {\n  string id = 1;\n  string rule_id = 2;\n  string variant_id = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  float rollout = 6;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationRolloutType {\n  UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 0;\n  SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 1;\n  THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRollout {\n  EvaluationRolloutType type = 1;\n  int32 rank = 2;\n  oneof rule {\n    EvaluationRolloutSegment segment = 3;\n    EvaluationRolloutThreshold threshold = 4;\n  }\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRolloutThreshold {\n  float percentage = 1;\n  bool value = 2;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n  OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR = 0;\n  AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRolloutSegment {\n  bool value = 1;\n  EvaluationSegmentOperator segment_operator = 2;\n  repeated EvaluationSegment segments = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n  ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE = 0;\n  ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationSegment {\n  string key = 1;\n  string name = 2;\n  string description = 3;\n  EvaluationSegmentMatchType match_type = 4;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp created_at = 5;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp updated_at = 6;\n  repeated EvaluationConstraint constraints = 7;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationFlagType {\n  VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE = 0;\n  BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationFlag {\n  string key = 1;\n  string name = 2;\n  string description = 3;\n  bool enabled = 4;\n  EvaluationFlagType type = 5;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp created_at = 6;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp updated_at = 7;\n  repeated EvaluationRule rules = 8;\n  repeated EvaluationRollout rollouts = 9;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n  UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 0;\n  STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 1;\n  NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 2;\n  BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 3;\n  DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 4;\n  ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationConstraint {\n  string id = 1;\n  EvaluationConstraintComparisonType type = 2;\n  string property = 3;\n  string operator = 4;\n  string value = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRule {\n  string id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationSegment segments = 2;\n  int32 rank = 3;\n  EvaluationSegmentOperator segment_operator = 4;\n  repeated EvaluationDistribution distributions = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespace {\n  string key = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot {\n  EvaluationNamespace namespace = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationFlag flags = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest {\n  string key = 1;\n  string reference = 2;\n}\n\n// flipt:sdk:ignore\nservice DataService {\n  rpc EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) returns (EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot);\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/evaluation.proto"
}
Output

  "content": "syntax = \"proto3\";\n\npackage flipt.evaluation;\n\nimport \"google/protobuf/timestamp.proto\";\n\noption go_package = \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\";\n\nmessage EvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2;\n  string flag_key = 3;\n  string entity_id = 4;\n  map<string, string> context = 5;\n  string reference = 6;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationRequest requests = 3;\n  string reference = 4;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationResponse {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationResponse responses = 2;\n  double request_duration_millis = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationReason {\n    UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n    FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n    MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON = 2;\n    DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON = 3;\n}\n\nenum ErrorEvaluationReason {\n  UNKNOWN_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n  NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationResponseType {\n  VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 0;\n  BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 1;\n  ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationResponse {\n    EvaluationResponseType type = 1;\n    oneof response {\n        BooleanEvaluationResponse boolean_response = 2;\n        VariantEvaluationResponse variant_response = 3;\n        ErrorEvaluationResponse error_response = 4;\n    }\n}\n\nmessage BooleanEvaluationResponse {\n  bool enabled = 1;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 2;\n  string request_id = 3;\n  double request_duration_millis = 4;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 5;\n  string flag_key = 6;\n}\n\nmessage VariantEvaluationResponse {\n  bool match = 1;\n  repeated string segment_keys = 2;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  string request_id = 6;\n  double request_duration_millis = 7;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 8;\n  string flag_key = 9;\n  string segment_match_type = 10;\n}\n\nmessage ErrorEvaluationResponse {\n  string flag_key = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2;\n  ErrorEvaluationReason reason = 3;\n}\n\nservice EvaluationService {\n  rpc Boolean(EvaluationRequest) returns (BooleanEvaluationResponse) {}\n  rpc Variant(EvaluationRequest) returns (VariantEvaluationResponse) {}\n  rpc Batch(BatchEvaluationRequest) returns (BatchEvaluationResponse) {}\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationDistribution {\n  string id = 1;\n  string rule_id = 2;\n  string variant_id = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  float rollout = 6;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationRolloutType {\n  UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 0;\n  SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 1;\n  THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRollout {\n  EvaluationRolloutType type = 1;\n  int32 rank = 2;\n  oneof rule {\n    EvaluationRolloutSegment segment = 3;\n    EvaluationRolloutThreshold threshold = 4;\n  }\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRolloutThreshold {\n  float percentage = 1;\n  bool value = 2;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n  OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR = 0;\n  AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRolloutSegment {\n  bool value = 1;\n  EvaluationSegmentOperator segment_operator = 2;\n  repeated EvaluationSegment segments = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n  ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE = 0;\n  ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationSegment {\n  string key = 1;\n  string name = 2;\n  string description = 3;\n  EvaluationSegmentMatchType match_type = 4;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp created_at = 5;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp updated_at = 6;\n  repeated EvaluationConstraint constraints = 7;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationFlagType {\n  VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE = 0;\n  BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationFlag {\n  string key = 1;\n  string name = 2;\n  string description = 3;\n  bool enabled = 4;\n  EvaluationFlagType type = 5;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp created_at = 6;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp updated_at = 7;\n  repeated EvaluationRule rules = 8;\n  repeated EvaluationRollout rollouts = 9;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n  UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 0;\n  STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 1;\n  NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 2;\n  BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 3;\n  DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 4;\n  ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationConstraint {\n  string id = 1;\n  EvaluationConstraintComparisonType type = 2;\n  string property = 3;\n  string operator = 4;\n  string value = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRule {\n  string id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationSegment segments = 2;\n  int32 rank = 3;\n  EvaluationSegmentOperator segment_operator = 4;\n  repeated EvaluationDistribution distributions = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespace {\n  string key = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot {\n  EvaluationNamespace namespace = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationFlag flags = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest {\n  string key = 1;\n  string reference = 2;\n}\n\n// flipt:sdk:ignore\nservice DataService {\n  rpc EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) returns (EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot);\n}\n",

42. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/evaluation.proto",
  "limit": 100
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "syntax = \"proto3\";\n\npackage flipt.evaluation;\n\nimport \"google/protobuf/timestamp.proto\";\n\noption go_package = \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\";\n\nmessage EvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2;\n  string flag_key = 3;\n  string entity_id = 4;\n  map<string, string> context = 5;\n  string reference = 6;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationRequest requests = 3;\n  string reference = 4;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationResponse {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationResponse responses = 2;\n  double request_duration_millis = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationReason {\n    UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n    FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n    MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON = 2;\n    DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON = 3;\n}\n\nenum ErrorEvaluationReason {\n  UNKNOWN_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n  NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationResponseType {\n  VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 0;\n  BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 1;\n  ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationResponse {\n    EvaluationResponseType type = 1;\n    oneof response {\n        BooleanEvaluationResponse boolean_response = 2;\n        VariantEvaluationResponse variant_response = 3;\n        ErrorEvaluationResponse error_response = 4;\n    }\n}\n\nmessage BooleanEvaluationResponse {\n  bool enabled = 1;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 2;\n  string request_id = 3;\n  double request_duration_millis = 4;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 5;\n  string flag_key = 6;\n}\n\nmessage VariantEvaluationResponse {\n  bool match = 1;\n  repeated string segment_keys = 2;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  string request_id = 6;\n  double request_duration_millis = 7;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 8;\n  string flag_key = 9;\n  string segment_match_type = 10;\n}\n\nmessage ErrorEvaluationResponse {\n  string flag_key = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2;\n  ErrorEvaluationReason reason = 3;\n}\n\nservice EvaluationService {\n  rpc Boolean(EvaluationRequest) returns (BooleanEvaluationResponse) {}\n  rpc Variant(EvaluationRequest) returns (VariantEvaluationResponse) {}\n  rpc Batch(BatchEvaluationRequest) returns (BatchEvaluationResponse) {}\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationDistribution {\n  string id = 1;\n  string rule_id = 2;\n  string variant_id = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  float rollout = 6;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationRolloutType {",
    "filePath": "/workspace/evaluation.proto",
    "numLines": 100,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 206
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: package evaluation\\n2: \\n3: import (\\n4: \\t\\\"context\\\"\\n5: \\t\\\"encoding/json\\\"\\n6: \\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n7: \\t\\\"hash/crc32\\\"\\n8: \\t\\\"slices\\\"\\n9: \\t\\\"sort\\\"\\n10: \\t\\\"strconv\\\"\\n11: \\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n12: \\t\\\"time\\\"\\n13: \\n14: \\terrs \\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\\\"\\n15: \\t\\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\\\"\\n16: \\t\\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\\\"\\n17: \\t\\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\\\"\\n18: \\t\\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\\\"\\n19: \\t\\\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\\\"\\n20: \\t\\\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\\\"\\n21: \\t\\\"go.uber.org/zap\\\"\\n22: )\\n23: \\n24: // Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\\n25: type Evaluator struct {\\n26: \\tlogger *zap.Logger\\n27: \\tstore  Storer\\n28: }\\n29: \\n30: // NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\\n31: func NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\\n32: \\treturn &Evaluator{\\n33: \\t\\tlogger: logger,\\n34: \\t\\tstore:  store,\\n35: \\t}\\n36: }\\n37: \\n38: func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\\n39: \\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\\n40: \\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\\n41: \\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\\n42: \\t\\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\\n43: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\\n44: \\t\\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"flag type %s invalid\\\", flag.Type)\\n45: \\t}\\n46: \\n47: \\tvar (\\n48: \\t\\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\\n49: \\t\\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\\n50: \\t\\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\\n51: \\t)\\n52: \\n53: \\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\\n54: \\n55: \\tdefer func() {\\n56: \\t\\tif err == nil {\\n57: \\t\\t\\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\\n58: \\t\\t\\t\\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\\n59: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tattribute.NewSet(\\n60: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tnamespaceAttr,\\n61: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tflagAttr,\\n62: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\\n63: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\\n64: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\\n65: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\\n66: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\\\"variant\\\"),\\n67: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t),\\n68: \\t\\t\\t\\t),\\n69: \\t\\t\\t)\\n70: \\t\\t} else {\\n71: \\t\\t\\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\\n72: \\t\\t}\\n73: \\n74: \\t\\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\\n75: \\t\\t\\tctx,\\n76: \\t\\t\\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\\n77: \\t\\t\\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\\n78: \\t\\t\\t\\tattribute.NewSet(\\n79: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tnamespaceAttr,\\n80: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tflagAttr,\\n81: \\t\\t\\t\\t),\\n82: \\t\\t\\t),\\n83: \\t\\t)\\n84: \\t}()\\n85: \\n86: \\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\\n87: \\t\\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\\n88: \\t\\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\\n89: \\t\\tRequestContext: r.Context,\\n90: \\t\\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\\n91: \\t\\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\\n92: \\t}\\n93: \\n94: \\tif !flag.Enabled {\\n95: \\t\\tresp.Match = false\\n96: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\\n97: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n98: \\t}\\n99: \\n100: \\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\\n101: \\tif err != nil {\\n102: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\\n103: \\t\\treturn resp, err\\n104: \\t}\\n105: \\n106: \\tif len(rules) == 0 {\\n107: \\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"no rules match\\\")\\n108: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n109: \\t}\\n110: \\n111: \\tvar lastRank int32\\n112: \\n113: \\t// rule loop\\n114: \\tfor _, rule := range rules {\\n115: \\t\\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\\n116: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\\n117: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\\\", rule.Rank)\\n118: \\t\\t}\\n119: \\n120: \\t\\tlastRank = rule.Rank\\n121: \\n122: \\t\\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\\n123: \\t\\tsegmentMatches := 0\\n124: \\n125: \\t\\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\\n126: \\t\\t\\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\\n127: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n128: \\t\\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\\n129: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn resp, err\\n130: \\t\\t\\t}\\n131: \\n132: \\t\\t\\tif matched {\\n133: \\t\\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(reason)\\n134: \\t\\t\\t\\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\\n135: \\t\\t\\t\\tsegmentMatches++\\n136: \\t\\t\\t}\\n137: \\t\\t}\\n138: \\n139: \\t\\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\\n140: \\t\\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n141: \\t\\t\\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\\n142: \\t\\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match ANY segments\\\")\\n143: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n144: \\t\\t\\t}\\n145: \\t\\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n146: \\t\\t\\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\\n147: \\t\\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match ALL segments\\\")\\n148: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n149: \\t\\t\\t}\\n150: \\t\\t}\\n151: \\n152: \\t\\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\\n153: \\t\\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\\n154: \\t\\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\\n155: \\t\\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\\n156: \\t\\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\\n157: \\t\\t\\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\\n158: \\t\\t\\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\\n159: \\t\\t}\\n160: \\n161: \\t\\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\\n162: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n163: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\\n164: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, err\\n165: \\t\\t}\\n166: \\n167: \\t\\tvar (\\n168: \\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\\n169: \\t\\t\\tbuckets            []int\\n170: \\t\\t)\\n171: \\n172: \\t\\tfor _, d := range distributions {\\n173: \\t\\t\\t// don't include 0% rollouts\\n174: \\t\\t\\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\\n175: \\t\\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\\n176: \\n177: \\t\\t\\t\\tif buckets == nil {\\n178: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\\n179: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n180: \\t\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n181: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\\n182: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n183: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n184: \\t\\t\\t}\\n185: \\t\\t}\\n186: \\n187: \\t\\t// no distributions for rule\\n188: \\t\\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\\n189: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Info(\\\"no distributions for rule\\\")\\n190: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n191: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n192: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n193: \\t\\t}\\n194: \\n195: \\t\\tvar (\\n196: \\t\\t\\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\\n197: \\t\\t\\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\\n198: \\t\\t\\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\\n199: \\t\\t\\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\\n200: \\t\\t\\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\\n201: \\t\\t)\\n202: \\n203: \\t\\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\\n204: \\t\\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\\n205: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = false\\n206: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match any distributions\\\")\\n207: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n208: \\t\\t}\\n209: \\n210: \\t\\td := validDistributions[index]\\n211: \\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"matched distribution\\\", zap.Reflect(\\\"evaluation_distribution\\\", d))\\n212: \\n213: \\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n214: \\t\\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\\n215: \\t\\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\\n216: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n217: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n218: \\t} // end rule loop\\n219: \\n220: \\treturn resp, nil\\n221: }\\n222: \\n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\\n224: // on the match type.\\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\\n226: \\tconstraintMatches := 0\\n227: \\n228: \\tvar reason string\\n229: \\n230: \\tfor _, c := range constraints {\\n231: \\t\\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\\n232: \\n233: \\t\\tvar (\\n234: \\t\\t\\tmatch bool\\n235: \\t\\t\\terr   error\\n236: \\t\\t)\\n237: \\n238: \\t\\tswitch c.Type {\\n239: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n240: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\\n241: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n242: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\\n243: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n244: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\\n245: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n246: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\\n247: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n248: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\\n249: \\t\\tdefault:\\n250: \\t\\t\\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\\\"unknown constraint type\\\")\\n251: \\t\\t}\\n252: \\n253: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n254: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"error matching constraint\\\", zap.String(\\\"property\\\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\\n255: \\t\\t\\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\\n256: \\t\\t}\\n257: \\n258: \\t\\tif match {\\n259: \\t\\t\\t// increase the matchCount\\n260: \\t\\t\\tconstraintMatches++\\n261: \\n262: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n263: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n264: \\t\\t\\t\\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\\n265: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n266: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n267: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\\n268: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n269: \\t\\t\\t}\\n270: \\t\\t} else {\\n271: \\t\\t\\t// no match\\n272: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n273: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n274: \\t\\t\\t\\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\\n275: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n276: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n277: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\\n278: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n279: \\t\\t\\t}\\n280: \\t\\t}\\n281: \\t}\\n282: \\n283: \\tvar matched = true\\n284: \\n285: \\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n286: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n287: \\t\\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\\n288: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ALL constraints\\\"\\n289: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n290: \\t\\t}\\n291: \\n292: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n293: \\t\\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\\n294: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ANY constraints\\\"\\n295: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n296: \\t\\t}\\n297: \\tdefault:\\n298: \\t\\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\\\"unknown match type %d\\\", segmentMatchType)\\n299: \\t\\tmatched = false\\n300: \\t}\\n301: \\n302: \\treturn matched, reason, nil\\n303: }\\n304: \\n305: func crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\\n306: \\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\\n307: }\\n308: \\n309: const (\\n310: \\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\\n311: \\t// distribution and rollout\\n312: \\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\\n313: \\n314: \\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\\n315: \\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\\n316: )\\n317: \\n318: func matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\\n319: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n320: \\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\\n321: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\\n322: \\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\\n323: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\\n324: \\t}\\n325: \\n326: \\tif v == \\\"\\\" {\\n327: \\t\\treturn false\\n328: \\t}\\n329: \\n330: \\tvalue := c.Value\\n331: \\n332: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n333: \\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\\n334: \\t\\treturn value == v\\n335: \\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\\n336: \\t\\treturn value != v\\n337: \\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\\n338: \\t\\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\\n339: \\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\\n340: \\t\\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\\n341: \\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\\n342: \\t\\tvalues := []string{}\\n343: \\t\\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\\n344: \\t\\t\\treturn false\\n345: \\t\\t}\\n346: \\t\\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\\n347: \\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\\n348: \\t\\tvalues := []string{}\\n349: \\t\\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\\n350: \\t\\t\\treturn false\\n351: \\t\\t}\\n352: \\t\\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\\n353: \\t}\\n354: \\n355: \\treturn false\\n356: }\\n357: \\n358: func matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n359: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n360: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n361: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\\n362: \\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\\n363: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\\n364: \\t}\\n365: \\n366: \\t// can't parse an empty string\\n367: \\tif v == \\\"\\\" {\\n368: \\t\\treturn false, nil\\n369: \\t}\\n370: \\n371: \\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\\n372: \\tif err != nil {\\n373: \\t\\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"parsing number from %q\\\", v)\\n374: \\t}\\n375: \\n376: \\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\\n377: \\t\\tvalues := []float64{}\\n378: \\t\\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\\n379: \\t\\t\\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"Invalid value for constraint %q\\\", c.Value)\\n380: \\t\\t}\\n381: \\t\\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\\n382: \\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\\n383: \\t\\tvalues := []float64{}\\n384: \\t\\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\\n385: \\t\\t\\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"Invalid value for constraint %q\\\", c.Value)\\n386: \\t\\t}\\n387: \\t\\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\\n388: \\t}\\n389: \\n390: \\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\\n391: \\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\\n392: \\tif err != nil {\\n393: \\t\\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"parsing number from %q\\\", c.Value)\\n394: \\t}\\n395: \\n396: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n397: \\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\\n398: \\t\\treturn value == n, nil\\n399: \\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\\n400: \\t\\treturn value != n, nil\\n401: \\tcase flipt.OpLT:\\n402: \\t\\treturn n < value, nil\\n403: \\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\\n404: \\t\\treturn n <= value, nil\\n405: \\tcase flipt.OpGT:\\n406: \\t\\treturn n > value, nil\\n407: \\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\\n408: \\t\\treturn n >= value, nil\\n409: \\t}\\n410: \\n411: \\treturn false, nil\\n412: }\\n413: \\n414: func matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n415: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n416: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n417: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\\n418: \\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\\n419: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\\n420: \\t}\\n421: \\n422: \\t// can't parse an empty string\\n423: \\tif v == \\\"\\\" {\\n424: \\t\\treturn false, nil\\n425: \\t}\\n426: \\n427: \\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\\n428: \\tif err != nil {\\n429: \\t\\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"parsing boolean from %q\\\", v)\\n430: \\t}\\n431: \\n432: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n433: \\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\\n434: \\t\\treturn value, nil\\n435: \\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\\n436: \\t\\treturn !value, nil\\n437: \\t}\\n438: \\n439: \\treturn false, nil\\n440: }\\n441: \\n442: func matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n443: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n444: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n445: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\\n446: \\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\\n447: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\\n448: \\t}\\n449: \\n450: \\t// can't parse an empty string\\n451: \\tif v == \\\"\\\" {\\n452: \\t\\treturn false, nil\\n453: \\t}\\n454: \\n455: \\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\\n456: \\tif err != nil {\\n457: \\t\\treturn false, err\\n458: \\t}\\n459: \\n460: \\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\\n461: \\tif err != nil {\\n462: \\t\\treturn false, err\\n463: \\t}\\n464: \\n465: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n466: \\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\\n467: \\t\\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\\n468: \\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\\n469: \\t\\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\\n470: \\tcase flipt.OpLT:\\n471: \\t\\treturn d.Before(value), nil\\n472: \\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\\n473: \\t\\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\\n474: \\tcase flipt.OpGT:\\n475: \\t\\treturn d.After(value), nil\\n476: \\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\\n477: \\t\\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\\n478: \\t}\\n479: \\n480: \\treturn false, nil\\n481: }\\n482: \\n483: func tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\\n484: \\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\\n485: \\t\\treturn d.UTC(), nil\\n486: \\t}\\n487: \\n488: \\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\\n489: \\t\\treturn d.UTC(), nil\\n490: \\t}\\n491: \\n492: \\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"parsing datetime from %q\\\", v)\\n493: }\\n494: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f@3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8/-/blob/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: package evaluation\n2: \n3: import (\n4: \t\"context\"\n5: \t\"encoding/json\"\n6: \t\"fmt\"\n7: \t\"hash/crc32\"\n8: \t\"slices\"\n9: \t\"sort\"\n10: \t\"strconv\"\n11: \t\"strings\"\n12: \t\"time\"\n13: \n14: \terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n15: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n16: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n17: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n18: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n19: \t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n20: \t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n21: \t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n22: )\n23: \n24: // Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\n25: type Evaluator struct {\n26: \tlogger *zap.Logger\n27: \tstore  Storer\n28: }\n29: \n30: // NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\n31: func NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n32: \treturn &Evaluator{\n33: \t\tlogger: logger,\n34: \t\tstore:  store,\n35: \t}\n36: }\n37: \n38: func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n39: \t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n40: \t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n41: \tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n42: \t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n43: \t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n44: \t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n45: \t}\n46: \n47: \tvar (\n48: \t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n49: \t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n50: \t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n51: \t)\n52: \n53: \tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n54: \n55: \tdefer func() {\n56: \t\tif err == nil {\n57: \t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n58: \t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n59: \t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n60: \t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n61: \t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n62: \t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n63: \t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n64: \t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n65: \t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n66: \t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"variant\"),\n67: \t\t\t\t\t),\n68: \t\t\t\t),\n69: \t\t\t)\n70: \t\t} else {\n71: \t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n72: \t\t}\n73: \n74: \t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n75: \t\t\tctx,\n76: \t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n77: \t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n78: \t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n79: \t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n80: \t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n81: \t\t\t\t),\n82: \t\t\t),\n83: \t\t)\n84: \t}()\n85: \n86: \tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n87: \t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n88: \t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n89: \t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n90: \t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n91: \t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n92: \t}\n93: \n94: \tif !flag.Enabled {\n95: \t\tresp.Match = false\n96: \t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n97: \t\treturn resp, nil\n98: \t}\n99: \n100: \trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n101: \tif err != nil {\n102: \t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n103: \t\treturn resp, err\n104: \t}\n105: \n106: \tif len(rules) == 0 {\n107: \t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n108: \t\treturn resp, nil\n109: \t}\n110: \n111: \tvar lastRank int32\n112: \n113: \t// rule loop\n114: \tfor _, rule := range rules {\n115: \t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n116: \t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n117: \t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n118: \t\t}\n119: \n120: \t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n121: \n122: \t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n123: \t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n124: \n125: \t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n126: \t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n127: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n128: \t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n129: \t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n130: \t\t\t}\n131: \n132: \t\t\tif matched {\n133: \t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n134: \t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n135: \t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n136: \t\t\t}\n137: \t\t}\n138: \n139: \t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n140: \t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n141: \t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n142: \t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n143: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n144: \t\t\t}\n145: \t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n146: \t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n147: \t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n148: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n149: \t\t\t}\n150: \t\t}\n151: \n152: \t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n153: \t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n154: \t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n155: \t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n156: \t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n157: \t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n158: \t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n159: \t\t}\n160: \n161: \t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n162: \t\tif err != nil {\n163: \t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n164: \t\t\treturn resp, err\n165: \t\t}\n166: \n167: \t\tvar (\n168: \t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n169: \t\t\tbuckets            []int\n170: \t\t)\n171: \n172: \t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n173: \t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n174: \t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n175: \t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n176: \n177: \t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n178: \t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n179: \t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n180: \t\t\t\t} else {\n181: \t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n182: \t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n183: \t\t\t\t}\n184: \t\t\t}\n185: \t\t}\n186: \n187: \t\t// no distributions for rule\n188: \t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n189: \t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n190: \t\t\tresp.Match = true\n191: \t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n192: \t\t\treturn resp, nil\n193: \t\t}\n194: \n195: \t\tvar (\n196: \t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n197: \t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n198: \t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n199: \t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n200: \t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n201: \t\t)\n202: \n203: \t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n204: \t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n205: \t\t\tresp.Match = false\n206: \t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n207: \t\t\treturn resp, nil\n208: \t\t}\n209: \n210: \t\td := validDistributions[index]\n211: \t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n212: \n213: \t\tresp.Match = true\n214: \t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n215: \t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n216: \t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n217: \t\treturn resp, nil\n218: \t} // end rule loop\n219: \n220: \treturn resp, nil\n221: }\n222: \n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n224: // on the match type.\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n226: \tconstraintMatches := 0\n227: \n228: \tvar reason string\n229: \n230: \tfor _, c := range constraints {\n231: \t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n232: \n233: \t\tvar (\n234: \t\t\tmatch bool\n235: \t\t\terr   error\n236: \t\t)\n237: \n238: \t\tswitch c.Type {\n239: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n240: \t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n241: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n242: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n243: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n244: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n245: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n246: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n247: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n248: \t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n249: \t\tdefault:\n250: \t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n251: \t\t}\n252: \n253: \t\tif err != nil {\n254: \t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n255: \t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n256: \t\t}\n257: \n258: \t\tif match {\n259: \t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n260: \t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n261: \n262: \t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n263: \t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n264: \t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n265: \t\t\t\tbreak\n266: \t\t\tdefault:\n267: \t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n268: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n269: \t\t\t}\n270: \t\t} else {\n271: \t\t\t// no match\n272: \t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n273: \t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n274: \t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n275: \t\t\t\tbreak\n276: \t\t\tdefault:\n277: \t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n278: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n279: \t\t\t}\n280: \t\t}\n281: \t}\n282: \n283: \tvar matched = true\n284: \n285: \tswitch segmentMatchType {\n286: \tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n287: \t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n288: \t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n289: \t\t\tmatched = false\n290: \t\t}\n291: \n292: \tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n293: \t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n294: \t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n295: \t\t\tmatched = false\n296: \t\t}\n297: \tdefault:\n298: \t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n299: \t\tmatched = false\n300: \t}\n301: \n302: \treturn matched, reason, nil\n303: }\n304: \n305: func crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n306: \treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n307: }\n308: \n309: const (\n310: \t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n311: \t// distribution and rollout\n312: \ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n313: \n314: \t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n315: \tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n316: )\n317: \n318: func matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n319: \tswitch c.Operator {\n320: \tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n321: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n322: \tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n323: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n324: \t}\n325: \n326: \tif v == \"\" {\n327: \t\treturn false\n328: \t}\n329: \n330: \tvalue := c.Value\n331: \n332: \tswitch c.Operator {\n333: \tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n334: \t\treturn value == v\n335: \tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n336: \t\treturn value != v\n337: \tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n338: \t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n339: \tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n340: \t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n341: \tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n342: \t\tvalues := []string{}\n343: \t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n344: \t\t\treturn false\n345: \t\t}\n346: \t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n347: \tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n348: \t\tvalues := []string{}\n349: \t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n350: \t\t\treturn false\n351: \t\t}\n352: \t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n353: \t}\n354: \n355: \treturn false\n356: }\n357: \n358: func matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n359: \tswitch c.Operator {\n360: \tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n361: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n362: \tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n363: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n364: \t}\n365: \n366: \t// can't parse an empty string\n367: \tif v == \"\" {\n368: \t\treturn false, nil\n369: \t}\n370: \n371: \tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n372: \tif err != nil {\n373: \t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n374: \t}\n375: \n376: \tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n377: \t\tvalues := []float64{}\n378: \t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n379: \t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n380: \t\t}\n381: \t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n382: \t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n383: \t\tvalues := []float64{}\n384: \t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n385: \t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n386: \t\t}\n387: \t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n388: \t}\n389: \n390: \t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n391: \tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n392: \tif err != nil {\n393: \t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n394: \t}\n395: \n396: \tswitch c.Operator {\n397: \tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n398: \t\treturn value == n, nil\n399: \tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n400: \t\treturn value != n, nil\n401: \tcase flipt.OpLT:\n402: \t\treturn n < value, nil\n403: \tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n404: \t\treturn n <= value, nil\n405: \tcase flipt.OpGT:\n406: \t\treturn n > value, nil\n407: \tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n408: \t\treturn n >= value, nil\n409: \t}\n410: \n411: \treturn false, nil\n412: }\n413: \n414: func matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n415: \tswitch c.Operator {\n416: \tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n417: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n418: \tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n419: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n420: \t}\n421: \n422: \t// can't parse an empty string\n423: \tif v == \"\" {\n424: \t\treturn false, nil\n425: \t}\n426: \n427: \tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n428: \tif err != nil {\n429: \t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n430: \t}\n431: \n432: \tswitch c.Operator {\n433: \tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n434: \t\treturn value, nil\n435: \tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n436: \t\treturn !value, nil\n437: \t}\n438: \n439: \treturn false, nil\n440: }\n441: \n442: func matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n443: \tswitch c.Operator {\n444: \tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n445: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n446: \tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n447: \t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n448: \t}\n449: \n450: \t// can't parse an empty string\n451: \tif v == \"\" {\n452: \t\treturn false, nil\n453: \t}\n454: \n455: \td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n456: \tif err != nil {\n457: \t\treturn false, err\n458: \t}\n459: \n460: \tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n461: \tif err != nil {\n462: \t\treturn false, err\n463: \t}\n464: \n465: \tswitch c.Operator {\n466: \tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n467: \t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n468: \tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n469: \t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n470: \tcase flipt.OpLT:\n471: \t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n472: \tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n473: \t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n474: \tcase flipt.OpGT:\n475: \t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n476: \tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n477: \t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n478: \t}\n479: \n480: \treturn false, nil\n481: }\n482: \n483: func tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n484: \tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n485: \t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n486: \t}\n487: \n488: \tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n489: \t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n490: \t}\n491: \n492: \treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n493: }\n494: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f@3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8/-/blob/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go"
  }
}
63. Agent @ -
Input
{
  "description": "Modify evaluation code to populate segment_match_type",
  "prompt": "You need to modify two Go files in the evaluation server to support the segment_match_type field:\n\n## Task 1: Modify legacy_evaluator.go\nFile: internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go\n\nChanges needed:\n1. Change the Evaluate method signature (line 38) from:\n   ```go\n   func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error)\n   ```\n   To:\n   ```go\n   func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, segmentMatchType string, err error)\n   ```\n\n2. Modify the return statements to include segmentMatchType:\n   - Line 97 (flag disabled): `return resp, \"\", nil`\n   - Line 103 (error getting rules): `return resp, \"\", err`\n   - Lines 108 and 192 (rule matched): Set segmentMatchType based on rule.SegmentOperator:\n     - If `rule.SegmentOperator == flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR`: use \"ANY\"\n     - If `rule.SegmentOperator == flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR`: use \"ALL\"\n   - Line 207 (no distribution match): `return resp, \"\", nil`\n   - Line 220 (no rule matched): `return resp, \"\", nil`\n\n3. For rule matches at lines 192 and 217, add code to set segmentMatchType:\n   ```go\n   segmentMatchType = \"ANY\"  // for OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n   // or\n   segmentMatchType = \"ALL\"  // for AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n   ```\n\n## Task 2: Modify evaluation.go\nFile: internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go\n\nChanges needed:\n1. Update the call to s.evaluator.Evaluate() (line 61) to handle the new return value:\n   ```go\n   resp, segmentMatchType, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n   ```\n\n2. After line 84 where the VariantEvaluationResponse is constructed, add:\n   ```go\n   ver.SegmentMatchType = segmentMatchType\n   ```\n\nThen write the modified files to:\n- /workspace/legacy_evaluator.go\n- /workspace/evaluation.go\n\nUse sg_read_file to read the files, make the modifications, and write them out using the Write tool.",
  "subagent_type": "general-purpose"
}

\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n58: \\t\\t}\\n59: \\t}\\n60: \\n61: \\tstore, err := env.EvaluationStore()\\n62: \\tif err != nil {\\n63: \\t\\treturn nil, err\\n64: \\t}\\n65: \\n66: \\tflag, err := \\t\\t\\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\\n113: \\t\\t\\t\\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\\n114: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tattribute.NewSet(\\n115: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tenvironmentAttr,\\n116: \\t\\t\\t)\\n126: \\t\\t} else {\\n127: \\t\\t\\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(environmentAttr, namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\\n128: \\t\\t}\\n129: \\t}()\\n142: \\n143: \\tif flag.DefaultVariant != nil {\\n144: \\t\\tdv, ok := getVariant(flag.GetDefaultVariant(), flag.Variants...)\\n145: \\t\\tif !ok {\\n146: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"default variant not found: %q\\\", flag.GetDefaultVariant())\\n147: \\t\\t}\\n148: \\n149: \\t\\tvar attachment string\\n150: \\t\\tif dv.Attachment != nil {\\n151: \\t\\t\\ta, err := dv.Attachment.MarshalJSON()\\n152: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n153: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n154: \\t\\t\\t}\\n155: \\n156: \\t\\t\\tattachment = string(a)\\n157: \\t\\t}\\n158: \\n159: \\t\\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\\n160: \\t\\tresp.VariantKey = dv.Key\\n161: \\t\\tresp.VariantAttachment = attachment\\n162: \\t}\\n163: \\n164: \\tif !flag.Enabled {\\n165: \\t\\tresp.Match = false\\n166: \\t\\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\\n167: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n168: \\t}\\n169: \\n170: \\trules, err := store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\\n171: \\tif err != nil {\\n172: \\t\\treturn nil, err\\n173: \\t}\\n174: \\n175: \\tif len(rules) == 0 {\\n176: \\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"no rules match\\\")\\n177: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n178: \\t}\\n179: \\n180: \\t// rule loop\\n181: \\tfor _, rule := range rules {\\n182: \\t\\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\\n183: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\\\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\\\", rule.Rank)\\n184: \\t\\t}\\n185: \\n186: \\t\\tlastRank = rule.Rank\\n187: \\n188: \\t\\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\\n189: \\t\\tsegmentMatches := 0\\n190: \\n191: \\t\\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\\n192: \\t\\t\\tmatched, reason, err := s.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\\n193: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n194: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn resp, err\\n195: \\t\\t\\t}\\n196: \\n197: \\t\\t\\tif matched {\\n198: \\t\\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\\n199: \\t\\t\\t\\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\\n200: \\t\\t\\t\\tsegmentMatches++\\n201: \\t\\t\\t}\\n202: \\t\\t}\\n203: \\n204: \\t\\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\\n205: \\t\\tcase core.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n206: \\t\\t\\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\\n207: \\t\\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match ANY segments\\\")\\n208: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n209: \\t\\t\\t}\\n210: \\t\\tcase core.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n211: \\t\\t\\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\\n212: \\t\\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match ALL segments\\\")\\n213: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n214: \\t\\t\\t}\\n215: \\t\\t}\\n216: \\n217: \\t\\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\\n218: \\t\\t\\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\\n219: \\t\\t}\\n220: \\n221: \\t\\tdistributions, err := store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey), storage.NewID(rule.ID))\\n222: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n223: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, err\\n224: \\t\\t}\\n225: \\n226: \\t\\tvar (\\n227: \\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\\n228: \\t\\t\\tbuckets            []int\\n229: \\t\\t)\\n230: \\n231: \\t\\tfor _, d := range distributions {\\n232: \\t\\t\\t// don't include 0% rollouts\\n233: \\t\\t\\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\\n234: \\t\\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\\n235: \\n236: \\t\\t\\t\\tif buckets == nil {\\n237: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\\n238: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n239: \\t\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n240: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\\n241: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n242: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n243: \\t\\t\\t}\\n244: \\t\\t}\\n245: \\n246: \\t\\t// no distributions for rule\\n247: \\t\\t// match is true here because it did match the segment/rule\\n248: \\t\\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\\n249: \\t\\t\\ts.logger.Info(\\\"no distributions for rule\\\")\\n250: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n251: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n252: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n253: \\t\\t}\\n254: \\n255: \\t\\tvar (\\n256: \\t\\t\\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\\n257: \\t\\t\\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\\n258: \\t\\t\\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\\n259: \\t\\t\\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\\n260: \\t\\t\\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\\n261: \\t\\t)\\n262: \\n263: \\t\\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\\n264: \\t\\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\\n265: \\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match any distributions\\\")\\n266: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = false\\n267: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n268: \\t\\t}\\n269: \\n270: \\t\\td := validDistributions[index]\\n271: \\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"matched distribution\\\", zap.Reflect(\\\"evaluation_distribution\\\", d))\\n272: \\n273: \\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n274: \\t\\tresp.VariantKey = d.VariantKey\\n275: \\t\\tresp.VariantAttachment = d.VariantAttachment\\n276: \\t\\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n277: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n278: \\t} // end rule loop\\n279: \\n280: \\treturn resp, nil\\n281: }\\n282: \\n283: // Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\\n284: func (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest)
